data.html_notes:
Andrei  [7:31 PM] Hey Francesco, do you know what this error is? I'm seeing a lot of them "errorCode":"ERR_GET_TX_FROM_CHAIN_FAILED","err":{"type":"Error","message":"[HRPC_ERR]=No such mempool or blockchain transaction. Use gettransaction for wallet transactions." [8:35 PM] Get transaction from chain failed it's the same hash [8:35 PM] 86e0c91ed20fccebf415f1fd201ba066549094fde793235818cc7cc335109e4a [8:36 PM] tx not found https://mempool.space/tx/86e0c91ed20fccebf415f1fd201ba066549094fde793235818cc7cc335109e4a [8:36 PM] maybe it was underpriced and it went out of the mempool [8:37 PM] we need to delete it and also have a fix to stop checking for it after some number of retries / time Andrei  [8:37 PM] how do we safely delete it? Francesco C.  [8:39 PM] I don't know on top of my head, I would need to check myself or with the team 
Please @Alex Atrash provide the command for Andrei to execute in production to delete one pending transaction LOGS

data.name: Provide commands to delete a transaction that is not on the mempool anymore
data.notes:
Andrei  [7:31 PM]
Hey Francesco, do you know what this error is? I'm seeing a lot of them

"errorCode":"ERR_GET_TX_FROM_CHAIN_FAILED","err":{"type":"Error","message":"[HRPC_ERR]=No such mempool or blockchain transaction. Use gettransaction for wallet transactions."



[8:35 PM]
Get transaction from chain failed

it's the same hash

[8:35 PM]
86e0c91ed20fccebf415f1fd201ba066549094fde793235818cc7cc335109e4a

[8:36 PM]
tx not found https://mempool.space/tx/86e0c91ed20fccebf415f1fd201ba066549094fde793235818cc7cc335109e4a

[8:36 PM]
maybe it was underpriced and it went out of the mempool

[8:37 PM]
we need to delete it and also have a fix to stop checking for it after some number of retries / time

Andrei  [8:37 PM]
how do we safely delete it?

Francesco C.  [8:39 PM]
I don't know on top of my head, I would need to check myself or with the team 


----------------------------------------


Please https://app.asana.com/1/45238840754660/profile/1211860479278729 provide the command for Andrei to execute in production to delete one pending transaction


LOGS
